name: SuggestedPostPaid
description: Describes a service message about a successful payment for a suggested post.

fields.name: suggested_post_message
fields.description: Message containing the suggested post. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency in which the payment was made. Currently, one of “XTR” for Telegram Stars or “TON” for toncoins.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: The amount of the currency that was received by the channel in nanotoncoins; for payments in toncoins only

fields.name: star_amount
fields.description: The amount of Telegram Stars that was received by the channel; for payments in Telegram Stars only
